# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-app
        image: nodejs:16
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: mongodb-secret
              key: uri
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: "production"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 3000
  type: ClusterIP
